title: gamochaeta suffruticosa
intro: Gamochaeta suffruticosa is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to South America and often found in the Andes mountains. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Gamochaeta suffruticosa include reducing pain and swelling, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are often used to promote healing and soothe irritated skin.
